description: "This  service is used to update the stock received status and received date properties for the items placed in an order.This helps in efficient order fulfillment tracking."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/companies/{companyId}/newSupplyOrderStatus"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This  service is used to update the stock received status and received date properties for the items placed in an order.This helps in efficient order fulfillment tracking.
